notable_phrases: strong start in fiscal 2021, driven by the continued strength of our commercial cloud
the next decade of economic performance for every business will be defined by the speed of their digital transformation
we intend to continue to go after the opportunity we see
summary: Microsoft reported strong Q1 FY2021 results with commercial cloud surpassing $15B revenue and 31% growth, emphasizing Azure expansion, digital transformation acceleration, and continued investment in growth opportunities despite some margin pressure and bookings volatility.
change_summary: No prior quarter available for comparison.
